'''Gandrossi VI''' was a planet in the [[Gandrossi system/Legends|Gandrossi system]] in [[Perinn sector/Legends|Perinn sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was under the authority of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Desh (Imperial)|Desh]].
